seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marnoo East and Marnoo West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Marnoo East vs Marnoo West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marnoo East and Marnoo West.
heading: Marnoo East vs Marnoo West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marnoo East, Victoria and Marnoo West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marnoo West has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Marnoo East (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marnoo East or Marnoo West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marnoo East has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Marnoo West scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marnoo East scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Marnoo West scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marnoo East or Marnoo West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marnoo West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
